TAVILY: Bhagwant Mann Govt launches most progressive Industrial ...: # Bhagwant Mann Govt launches most progressive Industrial & Business Development Policy 2026 to accelerate growth, attract investment and create jobs in Punjab. Bhagwant Mann Govt launches most progressive Industrial & Business Development Policy 2026 to accelerate growth, attract investment and create jobs in Punjab. Bhagwant Mann Govt launches most progressive Industrial & Business Development Policy 2026 to accelerate growth, attract investment and create jobs in Punjab. Punjab took a major step towards strengthening its industrial growth trajectory on Saturday with the launch of the Industrial & Business Development Policy 2026, a comprehensive framework aimed at accelerating industrial expansion, attracting large investments and generating employment opportunities across Punjab. The Industrial & Business Development Policy 2026 introduces a wide range of incentives and reforms aimed at making Punjab one of the most attractive investment destinations in India. Speaking on the occasion, Minister for Industries & Commerce Sanjeev Arora said, “This policy sends a clear message to investors across India and the world: Punjab is open for business.
TAVILY: Budget 2026 Offers Punjab Opportunity To Rebuild Growth Through ...: The Union Budget 2026 presents Punjab with a significant opportunity to accelerate economic transformation by aligning state-level execution with national priorities on infrastructure, manufacturing and human capital, said Rana Gurmeet Singh Sodhi, former cabinet minister of Punjab and member of the BJP executive committee. In a statement, Sodhi said the Budget reinforces the principle that strong nations are built through disciplined economics, decisive reforms and people-centric governance. According to Sodhi, the continued emphasis on public capital expenditure, infrastructure expansion and manufacturing-led development strengthens India’s economic resilience while reinforcing investor confidence. The Budget’s measures supporting MSMEs, startups and ease of doing business deepen the foundation of Atmanirbhar Bharat, empowering entrepreneurs and job creators across the country, he said. For Punjab specifically, Sodhi said the Budget offers a pathway to reposition the state as a hub of productivity and innovation. Under the leadership of Prime Minister Narendra Modi, he said, India continues its march towards Viksit Bharat, with Punjab well placed to play a defining role through enterprise-led and inclusive development.
